name: Pizza Dippers
recipeIngredient: 8 oz. can prepared pizza sauce, heated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease 1 large or 2 small cookie sheets.
3. Unroll the dough and cut it in half crosswise, forming two 6 1/2 x 8 inch pieces.
4. Cut each piece into eight 1-inch strips.
5. Place the strips 1 inch apart on the greased cookie sheet.
6. Brush each strip with margarine.
7. Sprinkle evenly with basil and oregano leaves.
8. Bake at 350°F for 11 to 17 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and sprinkle strips with cheese.
10. Bake an additional 1 to 2 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
11. Serve immediately with heated pizza sauce.
Yield: 16 servings
